item.name: Zeh Lar Dor
item.description:
The body of this large wavekin is wreathed with an array of complex markings.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: The array of mottled colors adorning this wavekin are the basis for its name. In the Yok Huy tongue, “Zeh Lar Dor” means “the fish that shines with every color from the depths of the earth to the farthest reaches of the night sky.”
